title: FUTERLY 10 Pcs Christmas Picks and Sprays,Artificial Holly Stem and Red Berry,Pine Cones and Pine Branches,Red Berries Christmas Decorations,Greenery Tree Picks for Birthday Wedding Decor
features: 10 PCS Christmas Artificial Holly Stem Set:Each fake pine branch has many small spot spray red berrys,small pine cone,evergreen holly stems and red berries.Realistic & Natural Looking!
Christmas Picks Dimensions:The red berries christmas decorations are in assorted sizes is stem 7.5 inch Tall / Long Wire/ Diameter of berrys

Decoration accessories: Christmas picks and sprays,DIY handmade garland wreath accessories,Christmas tree picks,Halloween birthday wedding tables centerpieces decor,stage & photo prop,gift wrap and valentine bouquets embellishment,mantle decoration,holiday floral arrangements.
Artificial berry stems set are made of high-quality materials and exquisite craftsmanship.We make sure it is easy to use, looks realistic and vivid,elegant and beautiful, sturdy and durable.
We want to provide our customers with nothing less than the best.If you have any questions about our products or service, We will try our best to solve your problem.
description: From the manufacturer Thank you for choosing FUTERLY Two kinds of pine cone berries are better when used together. One for you & one as for someone you care for greatly. 8 pcs Christmas picks berries pine cones for DIY crafts-Farmhouse Christmas ornaments and holiday decorations-Christmas tree and wreath supplies When your artificial stalk scion arrives, the artificial berry picks you ordered will meet all your needs for turning the craft into a work of art. The artificial pine tree decorations are widely applied for Winter or Decorating for a holiday like Christmas or Valentine's Day or a Birthday Party or Wedding. Decorating Christmas Tree/Arrangements kitchen tables/DIY wreath design/Gift Wrap Embellishment. Add them to your tree for an elegant and beautiful farmhouse look or as other festival decorations. The artificial pine branches will make your handicraft or flower bouquet vivid and beautiful. Say goodbye to boring & ordinary flower arrangement or wreath that is plain, boring & of poor quality; Say hello to a bright, festive, high-quality floral arrangement kit for your holiday crafts.
